# Decal.Adapter reference assembly

`Decal.Adapter.dll` is committed here for CI and local ShadowFilter builds. It is a compile-time reference only — not shipped in the installer.

To refresh from your Decal install:

```
C:\Program Files (x86)\Decal 3.0\Decal.Adapter.dll  →  externals\Decal\Decal.Adapter.dll
```

Or run: `./.github/scripts/prepare-decal-adapter.ps1`
